title: MOE Financial Assistance Scheme (MOE FAS)
text:
MOE Financial Assistance Scheme (MOE FAS) - SupportGoWhere
MOE Financial Assistance Scheme (MOE FAS)
Share link
Provides financial assistance to lower-income families with children who are in Government and Government-Aided Schools and Specialised Schools.
SCHEME HIGHLIGHTS
Full waiver of school and miscellaneous fees, free textbooks and school attire, and school meal and public transport subsidies for primary and secondary students
Full waiver of school fees and bursary of $1,600 per annum for pre-university students
Collapse all sections
About this support

Full waiver of school and miscellaneous fees

Free textbooks and school attire for primary and secondary school students

One of the following transport subsidies:

Covers 70% of school bus fares per year for primary school students who take school bus

$21 transport credit per month for primary and secondary students who take public transport

Meal subsidy

7 meals per school week for primary school students

10 meals per school week for secondary school students

Bursary of $1,600 per annum for pre-university students

Who is this for?

Singaporean students studying in Government and Government-Aided Schools and Specialised Schools

Average Gross Household Income of up to $4,000, or Average Per Capita Income of up to $1,000.

How to apply?

For students from Government and Government-Aided Schools- Apply online through this link

For students from Specialised Schools- Apply online through this link

Where can I find help?

View more details

MOE Hotline: 6872 2220

Submit an enquiry

Customer Service Centre 1 North Buona Vista Drive, MOE Building, Podium Block, Singapore 138675

Scheme last updated 27 Feb 2026
SUPPORT RECOMMENDER
Answer a few questions to find schemes and services you may be eligible for.
